channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kenyans Debate Resemblance Between Love Island USA Contestant Aniya Harvey and First Daughter Charlene Ruto
item.description: A viral TikTok video has sparked a heated online debate in Kenya, with many claiming that Love Island USA contestant Aniya Harvey bears a striking resemblance to President William Ruto's daughter, Cha...

item.title: Airwallex founder Jack Zhang confident in navigating US scrutiny amid growth
item.description: Airwallex founder Jack Zhang is confident he can navigate ongoing criticism from the United States regarding the fintech company's alleged ties to China. Despite facing scrutiny over its $11 billion v...

item.title: Young Australian Bull Riders Head to Global Competition
item.description: A group of young bull riders from Australia is preparing to compete in the Youth Bull Riding World Finals in the United States. The article highlights their rigorous training, the challenges they face...

item.title: Lilian Odira Wins 800m at Prefontaine Classic, Earns $20,000 Prize
item.description: World champion Lilian Odira secured victory in the women's 800m at the Prefontaine Classic in Eugene, Oregon, defeating Olympic champion Keely Hodgkinson with a season's best time of 1:56.19. The race...

item.title: Middle East tensions escalate as funeral of Iranian Supreme Leader Khamenei unfolds
item.description: The funeral of Iran's late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has become a focal point of geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, with U.S. President Donald Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benja...

item.title: Lok Sabha to Review Inquiry Report on Justice Varma's Allegations
item.description: The Lok Sabha Speaker, Om Birla, announced that the inquiry report against Justice Yashwant Varma, a former Allahabad High Court judge, will be tabled in the upcoming monsoon session starting July 20....

item.title: IHC Finalizes Three Nominees for Judicial Vacancies
item.description: The Islamabad High Court (IHC) has finalized three candidates for vacant judge positions, with their names forwarded to the Judicial Commission of Pakistan (JCP) for scrutiny under new 2026 rules. The...

item.title: Bandits kidnap nine travelers on Katsina road amid security concerns
item.description: A group of bandits has abducted nine travelers on a road in Southern Katsina State, according to a recent report. The incident occurred during heightened security operations in the region, which has s...

item.title: Supporting Children Through Sports Disappointment: Emotional Regulation Strategies
item.description: The article explores how parents can assist children in managing emotional distress following the Socceroos' exit from the FIFA World Cup. It emphasizes the importance of emotional regulation, a skill...

item.title: Bangalore daycare abuse case sparks nationwide concern over child safety
item.description: The alleged abuse of toddlers at a Capgemini daycare in Bangalore has triggered widespread alarm about child safety in corporate crèches. CCTV footage and whistleblower videos reportedly showed caregi...

item.title: Springboks secure 45-21 victory over England in Nations Championship opener
item.description: The Springboks delivered a commanding 45-21 victory over England in the opening match of the Nations Championship at Ellis Park. Despite not being at their peak performance, the South African team sho...

item.title: Americans celebrate the nation's 250th anniversary despite extreme heat, storms and a small fire on the Brooklyn Bridge
item.description: The United States marked the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence with celebrations across the country, despite extreme weather disrupting many planned events. Large par...

item.title: Vatican and Nigeria strengthen ties with Pope's potential visit discussed
item.description: Archbishop Paul Gallagher, Vatican's foreign minister, hinted during a meeting with Nigerian President Bola Tinubu that Pope Leo XIV may visit Nigeria in the future. The meeting at Aso Rock Presidenti...

item.title: Fire incident on Brooklyn Bridge during fireworks display
item.description: A fire broke out on the Brooklyn Bridge in New York City during the July Fourth fireworks display, prompting emergency responders to extinguish the blaze. The incident occurred as part of a scaled-dow...

item.title: South Africa's Women's Team Defeats US in Rugby Match
item.description: The South African women's rugby team, the Boks, delivered a dominant performance against the higher-ranked United States team in their opening match of a two-Test series. The Springboks, ranked 10th g...

item.title: Historical Ties Between Tao and Ivatan Communities
item.description: The article explores the renewed relationship between the Tao people of Orchid Island (Taiwan) and the Ivatan community of Batanes, Philippines, through a 2026 voyage that symbolizes centuries-old cul...

item.title: Kai Montinola's Performance of 'Hangganan Ko' for Moana: A Lifelong Dream Fulfilled
item.description: Kai Montinola, a Filipino actor and singer, recently shared the profound significance of performing 'Hangganan Ko' for Disney's animated film 'Moana.' The song, originally from the Philippine musical ...

item.title: Dagupan's Sunday Punch Ceases Operations After 70 Years
item.description: Sunday Punch, the longest-running community newsweekly in the Philippines, is set to cease operations after nearly seven decades. Founded in July 1956 by journalist Ermin Erfe Garcia, the English-lang...

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's MSG Wedding: Guests Share Emotional Vows and Decor Details
item.description: The article details the lavish wedding of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, held at the Madison Square Garden (MSG) in New York. Guests, including celebrities and friends, shared intimate accounts of the...

item.title: Jennie unveils unreleased tracks at Open’er Festival 2026
item.description: Jennie, the BLACKPINK member, headlined the final night of the Open’er Festival 2026 with a 17-track set that included unreleased songs such as 'Lock It Down', 'Heaven', and 'Less Than A Lover'. The p...
